item.title: NizaarKinsella: Nizaar Kinsella reposteó Nizaar Kinsella @NizaarKinsella · 10h Asked how Estevao is, Rosenior said: "Devastated, he was
item.description:
Nizaar Kinsella reposteó Nizaar Kinsella @NizaarKinsella · 10h Asked how Estevao is, Rosenior said: "Devastated, he was crying at half-time, it looks like his hamstring. They are good lads."
Fernandez had what Rosenior hopes is only cramp when he came off.
On the Champions League: "It gives us a mountain to climb, it's not Mostrar más 16 37 711 65 mil

item.title: samcarney_: Laurie Whitwell reposteó Sam Carney @samcarney_ · 10h First time #MUFC have won away at Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool i
item.description: Laurie Whitwell reposteó Sam Carney @samcarney_ · 10h First time #MUFC have won away at Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool in the same league season since 1984/85. 43 2 mil 15 mil 290 mil

item.title:
Jack_Gaughan: Jack Gaughan @Jack_Gaughan · 3min Guardiola would love to have prime Fernandinho as an option today
First interview si
item.description:
Jack Gaughan @Jack_Gaughan · 3min Guardiola would love to have prime Fernandinho as an option today
First interview since retirement
“I told Pep to sort the tactics and I’ll sort the players” De dailymail.co.uk 12 488
